subtasks.name: Ignite the Engine! (Kitchen Entry & Mood Set)
subtasks.description: Stand up from where you are, walk directly to the kitchen. Immediately put on your favorite high-energy playlist, a captivating podcast, or an audiobook to engage your brain.

subtasks.name: Mission Briefing (Concept & Core Ingredients)
subtasks.description: Quickly scan the fridge/pantry for inspiration. Decide on a dinner *concept* (e.g., 'pasta night,' 'quick stir-fry,' 'sheet pan bake'). Pull out the 1-2 most crucial ingredients for this concept.

subtasks.name: Prep Power-Up (Gather, Chop, Setup)
subtasks.description: Gather *all* remaining ingredients and necessary tools (pots, pans, cutting board). Chop/prep the main components (e.g., slice onions, dice chicken). Get water boiling or oven preheating.

subtasks.name: Launch Sequence (Main Cooking Start)
subtasks.description: Get the primary components of your main dish actively cooking (e.g., sear meat, add pasta to boiling water, put your sheet pan in the oven). *Crucially, set a timer for the next phase!*

subtasks.name: The Final Push (Sides & Serving)
subtasks.description: While your main dish finishes, quickly prepare any simple sides (e.g., toss a quick salad, steam some veggies, warm bread). Finish cooking the main dish, plate everything, and serve!
